mapper.sql: a.id, a.parent_id AS "parentId", a.lft, a.rgt, a.name, a.perms, a.ranks, a.url, a.target, a.display_flag AS "displayFlag", a.display_params AS "displayParams", a.priority, a.remarks, a.create_date AS "createDate", a.create_by AS "createUserId", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.update_by AS "updateUserId", a.del_flag
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_menu a WHERE a.id IN #{item}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu(id, parent_id, lft, rgt, name, perms, ranks, url, target, display_flag, display_params, priority, remarks, create_date, create_by, update_date, update_by, del_flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{parentId}, #{lft}, #{rgt}, #{name}, #{perms}, #{ranks}, #{url}, #{target}, #{displayFlag}, #{displayParams}, #{priority}, #{remarks}, #{createDate}, #{createUserId}, #{updateDate}, #{updateUserId}, #{delFlag})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, perms = #{perms}, ranks = #{ranks}, url = #{url}, target = #{target}, display_flag = #{displayFlag}, display_params = #{displayParams}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_date = #{updateDate}, update_by = #{updateUserId}, del_flag = #{delFlag} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id AS "parentId", lft, rgt FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id}
